narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp I (precinct in Warren County) has 831 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.5 percentage points.
